items.title: Black beauty queen who represented South Africa at Miss World during apartheid dies aged 76
items.dek: At the 1972 Miss World contest, Cynthia Shange was one of two contestants from South Africa - one black and one white.
items.body: At the 1972 Miss World contest, Cynthia Shange was one of two contestants from South Africa - one black and one white.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Police gunfight with favela gang traps 200 tourists on hilltop
items.dek: The access route to Morro Dois Irmãos was blocked during the operation in Vidigal, leaving scores of alarmed sightseers stuck on the hill.
items.body: The access route to Morro Dois Irmãos was blocked during the operation in Vidigal, leaving scores of alarmed sightseers stuck on the hill.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: More than 200 rescued from IS-linked group in DR Congo
items.dek: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.
items.body: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.
items.author: IriLine Desk
